title: T-118 — UI: Settings toggle for `require_grn_qc_inspection` (Quality section placeholder)
prompt:
Add a `Quality` settings sub-section toggle for `require_grn_qc_inspection` to the Settings UI, surfacing the flag created in T-117.

Deliverable:
- New section card on `/settings/quality` (Server Component shell) with a single toggle: 'Require QC inspection on GRN before stock available'.
- Helper text under the toggle: 'When ON, GRN completion will require QA sign-off (full enforcement ships with the Quality module).' — i18n keys in 02-settings.json (PL+EN) per existing T-116 namespace seed.
- Save action calls a new Server Action `setRequireGrnQcInspection(value: boolean)` that updates the flag from T-117 inside withOrgContext + emits an audit_log entry (entity_type='settings.quality_flag').
- RBAC: `settings.quality.write` to mutate; otherwise toggle is disabled with tooltip.
- Show a 'Coming with Quality module' info banner above the toggle.

RED tests:
- RTL: toggle reflects current flag value; flipping calls Server Action; audit_log entry created (mocked); RBAC read-only path renders disabled toggle.
- i18n parity: keys present in PL + EN.

Do NOT implement GRN-side enforcement (09-QUALITY scope). Do NOT add new tables. Do NOT bypass audit_log.

Close-out: paste RTL output + screenshot path of toggle + i18n key list added.

pipeline_inputs.description: Settings UI toggle for require_grn_qc_inspection + Server Action + audit_log + i18n keys.
pipeline_inputs.details: New /settings/quality section card. Server Action wraps T-117 accessor's setter. RBAC + audit + i18n keys. Banner notes full enforcement ships with 09-QUALITY.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page loads with flag=false, when rendered, then the toggle is OFF and helper text + 'Coming with Quality module' banner are visible.
Given the user toggles ON, when Save settles, then setRequireGrnQcInspection is called with true and an audit_log entry exists.
Given a user without settings.quality.write, when on the page, then the toggle is disabled with tooltip.
Given i18n keys are added, when 02-settings namespace test runs, then PL + EN parity holds.
Given `pnpm vitest run` for the toggle test + namespace test, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED RTL tests for default render, toggle save path, RBAC disabled, audit emission (mock).
RED i18n parity test (re-uses T-116 namespace test).
Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/(admin)/settings/quality && pnpm vitest run apps/web/messages/__tests__/02-settings.namespace.test.ts`.
risk_red_lines: Do not bypass withOrgContext or audit_log.
